50:         Action = [
51:           "kms:Encrypt",
52:           "kms:Decrypt",
53:           "kms:ReEncrypt*",
54:           "kms:GenerateDataKey*",
55:           "kms:CreateGrant",

64:               "elasticache.${data.aws_region.current.name}.amazonaws.com",
65:               "s3.${data.aws_region.current.name}.amazonaws.com"

68:           }
69:         }
70:       }
71:     ]
72:   })
